steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At sea level, $x=0$, and the boiling point is $198$ degrees Fahrenheit. So the equation must start with $198$.

steps.title: Represent the decrease
steps.content:
The boiling point decreases by $1$ degree for every $520$ feet. At $x$ feet above sea level, the decrease is
$$\frac{x}{520}$$

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content:
Subtract the decrease from the sea-level boiling point:
$$B=198-\frac{x}{520}$$
The answer is D.
